{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Zakareth's eye
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Zakareth the Sixth]] has a red stone replacing his left eye that gleams bright red.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]]'s left eye socket contains a rolling crimson flame that replaced his glowing red stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
